title: Demos and architectures
excerpt: description: Explore demo applications and reference architectures that use D1 databases. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Learn how you can use D1 within your existing application and architecture. * [Starter code for D1 Sessions API ↗](https://github.com/cloudflare/templates/tree/main/d1-starter-sessions-api-template): An introduction to D1 Sessions API. This demo simulates purchase orders administration.
